  "reasoning": "The 16th Amendment (income tax) and massive WWI mobilization created a vastly more powerful state with unprecedented fiscal and administrative capacity. Concurrently, wartime measures like the Espionage and Sedition Acts severely suppressed dissent, weakening civil society's ability to check this new power.",
